PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?tournament ?tournamentLabel WHERE {
  ?tournament wdt:P31 wd:Q13219666 ; wdt:P17 wd:Q30 ; rdfs:label ?tournamentLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?tournamentLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER(! regex(str(?tournamentLabel) , 'Junior' , 'i'))
  FILTER(! regex(str(?tournamentLabel) , '[0-9]{4}' , 'i'))
}
